response.justification: Wei Chen brings well over a decade of full-stack experience with strong alignment on TypeScript, Node.js, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, and testing culture (TDD, test-library authorship, workshops). Recent hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq directly matches the required AI agent development experience. The main gaps are framework-specific: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience, and frontend history leans heavily on Ember.js rather than React, though React was used at Optilyz. These are learnable given the candidate's demonstrated polyglot adaptability.
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js experience with cloud (AWS CDK) and Kubernetes deployment
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work matching the AI agent development requirement
Strong testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience; frontend history is predominantly Ember.js with limited React exposure
Kotlin absent from skills; Java experience appears dated and secondary
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not explicitly listed despite broad testing background

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
